channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UK Covid Vaccine Rollout Praised in Inquiry Report, but Concerns Remain
item.description: A recent report from the UK’s Covid inquiry has lauded the rollout of Covid-19 vaccines as an “extraordinary feat,” highlighting its scale and speed. Over 132 million vaccine doses were administered i...

item.title: Researchers Discover Lithium Hidden in Pyrite from Ancient Shale Rocks
item.description: Researchers from West Virginia University have made an unexpected discovery that could reshape the way we source lithium, a critical element for modern batteries. Analyzing middle-Devonian shale sampl...

item.title: Parliament Session Marked by Priyanka Gandhi's Humorous Remark on Amit Shah
item.description: The recent session of the Lok Sabha witnessed a moment of lighthearted banter between Priyanka Gandhi Vadra and Amit Shah, amidst the usual parliamentary proceedings. During the discussion, Priyanka G...

item.title: CRB trains local contractors on joint ventures and project compliance
item.description: Dar es Salaam: Local contractors in Tanzania have been encouraged to operate their businesses strictly following laws and regulations related to joint ventures and public procurement. This was emphasi...

item.title: International Efforts Intensify as US-Iran Conflict Continues
item.description: Amidst ongoing conflict with the United States and Israel, international mediation efforts are escalating to secure a ceasefire and ensure regional stability. Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif ...

item.title: London: Three Arrested After Arson Attempt at Persian Media Office
item.description: Police in London have made three arrests following an attempted arson attack on the offices of Volant Media, a parent company of the Persian news channel Iran International, located in Wembley, northw...

item.title: Julius Malema Sentenced to Five Years for Unlawful Firearm Use at EFF Event
item.description: The East London Regional Court has sentenced Julius Malema to five years in prison for unlawfully handling and firing a rifle at an Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF) birthday celebration. The court foun...

item.title: Eight Puerto Princesa Police Officers Face Administrative Charges After Fatal Shooting
item.description: Administrative complaints have been filed against eight members of the Puerto Princesa City Police in Palawan over a shooting incident that resulted in the deaths of two policemen and a Bureau of Corr...

item.title: MSport Teams Up with Chelsea FC to Boost Fan Engagement Before Matches
item.description: MSport, one of Africa's leading betting platforms, don join hand with Chelsea Football Club launch new TVC campaign wey dem call 'Play Where You Belong'. Di campaign dey show say football no just star...

item.title: Fatal Dog Attack in UK Results in Death of Elderly Woman
item.description: An elderly woman has tragically died following a fatal dog attack in the United Kingdom. This incident marks the third such fatality within a single week, raising serious concerns about public safety ...

item.title: Lowering Systolic Blood Pressure Below 120 mm Hg May Reduce Heart Risks
item.description: New research from Mass General Brigham indicates that aiming for a lower systolic blood pressure target, specifically below 120 mm Hg, can provide significant cardiovascular benefits, including reduct...

item.title: Weekend Weather Update: Kenya Met Forecasts Rainfall Across Several Regions
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has released a weather forecast indicating that most parts of Kenya are likely to experience rainfall this weekend, from Friday, April 17th to Sunday, April 1...

item.description: On Thursday, Julius Malema, leader of the Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF), will receive his sentence at the East London Magistrate's Court after being found guilty of violating gun laws. The convictio...

item.title: Background of Zaldy Co Amid Flood Control Scandal

item.title: COAS Asim Munir holds talks at Iran's military HQ amid peace efforts

item.title: Tunu Halisi to compose AFCON 2027 song after winning BASATA Rising Star Award
item.description: DAR ES SALAAM – The National Arts Council of Tanzania (BASATA) has officially named Tunu Halisi as the winner of the BASATA Rising Star Awards. In recognition of his achievement, Tunu Halisi has been ...

item.title: Ogun State Upskills Workforce with Digital Training Initiative
item.description: The Ogun State government in Nigeria has announced a program to equip 200 personnel with vital digital skills. This initiative, driven by the State's commitment to technological advancement and workfo...

item.title: Israel and Lebanon Agree on Temporary Ceasefire After US-Brokered Talks
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced that Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a ten-day ceasefire, bringing a temporary pause to the conflict that erupted in Lebanon on March 2 following Hezbollah's atta...

item.title: Maharashtra Legislative Council Elections: Dates Announced for Nine Seats & Bypoll
item.description: The Election Commission of India (ECI) has announced the dates for elections to nine seats of the Maharashtra Legislative Council, along with a bypoll to one seat. Voting will take place on May 12th. ...
